data.title: J.B. Hunt partners with Triumph Network for fast, automated payment solution, boosting carrier efficiency.
data.description: In Dallas, J.B. Hunt recently announced its partnership with the Triumph Network, incorporating Triumph's cutting-edge automated payment system. This move aims to expedite and enhance carrier payment processes. This collaboration signifies a significant step towards optimizing payment cycles within the industry.

data.title: Corpay appoints David Bunch to Board of Directors from Shell PLC, leading over 40,000 sites and serving 30 million customers.
data.description: In Atlanta, Corpay, Inc. (NYSE: CPAY) has appointed David Bunch to its Board of Directors. Bunch, based in London, is the Group Executive Vice President for Mobility & Convenience at Shell PLC. He oversees a vast branded network of over 40,000 convenience, B2B, and EV mobility sites, catering to 30 million customers each day. Bunch's appointment is effective immediately, bringing his extensive international experience to Corpay's leadership team.

data.title: C3is Inc. acquires 2 medium range product tankers with 50,000 dwt each from South Korea, expanding its fleet.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in Athens, Greece, C3is Inc., a ship-owning company listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CISS, revealed plans to grow its fleet. The company disclosed that it has signed two Memoranda of Agreement to purchase two MR product tankers. Each vessel has a capacity of around 50,000 deadweight tons (dwt) and was constructed in South Korea in 2008 and 2011. This expansion move marks a significant development for C3is Inc. in its dry bulk and tanker seaborne transportation services sector.

data.title: IQVIA ranked No. 1 on 2026 Fortune Most Admired Companies list for the fifth year in a row. Appeared on list for nine years.
data.description: IQVIA, a prominent provider of clinical research services and healthcare intelligence, has been ranked as the top company in the Health Care: Pharmacy and Other Services category on the 2026 Fortune® World’s Most Admired Companies™ list. This marks the fifth consecutive year IQVIA has achieved this position and the ninth consecutive year it has been featured on the list. Noteworthy is that IQVIA has retained the top spot in its category for seven years. The company is listed on the NYSE under the symbol IQV.

data.title: agilon Health to report Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on February 25, 2026, hosting conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET. For access dial (833) 470-1428 (U.S.) and +1 (404) 975-4839 (international).
data.description: Agilon Health, Inc. (NYSE: AGL) from Westerville, Ohio, will be reporting its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after the market closes on Wednesday, February 25, 2026. Following this release, a conference call is scheduled at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss the results. Interested participants can join the call by dialing (833) 470-1428 for U.S. callers and +1 (404) 975-4839 for international participants. Agilon Health is known for its role in empowering physicians to enhance healthcare within communities.

data.title: Procore will report Q4 and full fiscal year 2025 financial results on Feb 12, 2026, after markets close and host conference call at 2:00 pm Pacific Time.
data.description: Procore Technologies, Inc. based in Carpinteria, California, a prominent global provider of construction management software listed under NYSE as PCOR, is set to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025 post the closure of U.S. financial markets on Thursday, February 12, 2026. Following this update, the company will conduct a conference call at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time on the same day to delve into Procore's financial performance.

data.title: Alcoa Corp reports strong 2025 results: Revenue $12.8B, Net income $1.17B. Shares details of Q4 earnings.
data.description: In Pittsburgh, Alcoa Corporation (NYSE: AA; ASX: AAI) released their financial report for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, demonstrating robust aluminum pricing and operational performance. In the fourth quarter, revenue was $3.449M compared to $2.995M in the previous quarter, with full year revenue reaching $12.831M, up from $11.895M in 2024. Net income attributable to Alcoa Corporation was $226M in Q4 and $1.170M for the year, contrasting sharply with the $232M and $60M reported in the same periods last year. The company's earnings per share attributable to Alcoa Corporation common shareholders were not disclosed.

data.title: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) declares $0.25 quarterly dividend per share to stockholders; payable on Feb 19, 2026 to record holders on Feb 5.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 22, 2026, the board of directors at KB Home (NYSE: KBH) approved a quarterly cash dividend of $.25 per share for their common stock. This dividend will be paid out on February 19, 2026, to shareholders recorded on February 5, 2026. KB Home, a prominent company, is recognized for its contributions in the housing industry.

data.title: Mueller Water Products declares $0.070 quarterly dividend per share, payable on Feb 20, 2026 to stockholders of record on Feb 10.
data.description: In Atlanta on January 22, 2026, Mueller Water Products, Inc. (NYSE: MWA) revealed that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend of $0.070 per share. This dividend is set to be disbursed around February 20, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as stockholders by the end of business on February 10, 2026.

data.title: Columbia Banking System reports Q4 2025 results: Net income $215m, operating net income $243m, EPS $0.72, operating EPS $0.82. CEO calls it a strong year end.
data.description: In Tacoma, Washington, on January 22, 2026, it was reported that the company saw a significant increase in financial figures. Net income rose to $215 million, while operating net income reached $243 million. Earnings per common share - diluted also showed growth, increasing from $0.72 to $0.82. The CEO stated that the fourth quarter performance was robust, marking the conclusion of a successful year.

data.title: Keller Williams ranked No. 5 on Glassdoor’s Best Places to Work 2026, top in real estate.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Keller Williams has achieved a significant milestone as it secures the 5th spot among the top employers in the United States, spanning all industries. Additionally, Keller Williams holds the distinction of being the foremost real estate company on Glassdoor's highly regarded list of Best Places to Work for the year 2026.

data.title: RXNT named 2026 Gartner Digital Markets Leader in 5 categories, awarded as Shortlist and FrontRunner. #HealthcareTech
data.description: In a recent report, RXNT was recognized as a top software provider by Gartner for the year 2026. The company, hailing from Maryland, has been classified as a leader in five categories including Shortlist and FrontRunner. This acknowledgment further solidifies RXNT's position in the ambulatory healthcare technology sector. The announcement was made on January 22, 2026, validating RXNT's strength in the industry.

data.title: Senior living expert Matt Clinton discusses respectful care in assisted living on HelloNation, highlighting how respect and dignity are essential in daily operations. An article that shares insights on compassionate care practices.
data.description: In Hermiston, Oregon on January 22, 2026, Matt Clinton from Sun Terrace Hermiston discussed the significance of respectful care in assisted living facilities in an article on HelloNation. Clinton emphasized that maintaining a culture of respect and dignity is crucial for the well-being of individuals residing in such facilities.

data.title: Amazon.com (NASDAQ: AMZN) to discuss Q4 2025 financial results in webcast on Feb 5, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET.
data.description: Amazon.com, Inc. revealed plans for a conference call to review its Q4 2025 financial performance on February 5, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET. The call, open to the public, will feature a live webcast with access to both audio and presentation slides on their investor relations website, www.amazon.com/ir, for a minimum of three months post-event.

data.title: IREN to release Q2 FY26 financial results on Feb. 5, 2026 for the three months ending Dec 31, 2025; conference call at 5pm EST.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, IREN Limited (NASDAQ: IREN) disclosed its plan to unveil financial results for the three months up to December 31, 2025, on February 5, 2026. The event will commence with a conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Credit Acceptance Corp (Nasdaq: CACC) will release Q4 2025 earnings on Jan 29, 2026 after market closes, with a webcast at 5:00pm ET.
data.description: Southfield, Michigan-based Credit Acceptance Corporation (Nasdaq: CACC) revealed plans to release its fourth quarter 2025 earnings report on Thursday, January 29, 2026, post-market closure. The company, commonly referred to as "Credit Acceptance," will hold a webcast on the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time to delve into the financial results. This announcement came from the corporation on January 22, 2026, setting the stage for investors and stakeholders as they anticipate the forthcoming update.

data.title: Hagens Berman investigates 33.7M data breach in Coupang (CPNG) with 6-month access by ex-employee. Shareholders reminded.
data.description: Law firm partner Reed Kathrein is currently looking into claims regarding the statements made regarding "proactive security" at Coupang, Inc. in response to a former employee having undetected access for a period of six months. The investigation, which was prompted by shareholder rights firm Hagens Berman, focuses on allegations related to the NYSE-listed company CPNG. Investors in Coupang have been reminded by Hagens Berman about an upcoming deadline on February 17.
